channel.title: Projects on CrazyBread' Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on CrazyBread' Blog

item.title: Tetris Environment(Gym-Compatible)
item.description: This project provides a custom Tetris environment for reinforcement learning using the Gymnasium API. It includes a Tetris game implementation and an environment wrapper that allows for easy integration with RL algorithms.

item.title: Nesy Link: An environment for reinforcement learning
item.description: The Nesy Link Project is an environment based on the GB game: The Legend of Zelda: Link’s Awakening. It is designed for reinforcement learning research, providing a complex and dynamic environment for testing and developing RL algorithms.
